description: Phase 1: Inventory + classification of the entire OneDrive snapshot. Classifies each file by extension heuristic and produces a breakdown by category/year/area.

steps.note: Writes 'category' property into every node (folder, spreadsheet, pdf, image, etc.)
Global stats: totals, by_category, by_year, top_level_areas
Stats scoped to CONTROL INTERNO (business core)

AGENT: Compose a markdown report combining classification.breakdown + global_summary.by_category + global_summary.by_year + top_level_areas + control_interno_summary. Include pretty-printed byte sizes and percentages.
